items.original_candidate: Doug Settle (or similar high school classmate)
items.evidence: The corrected transcript renders the name in canonical form at three distinct passages, internally consistent: (1) 'Why flint? Doug Settle it was a very good friend of mine. We grew up pretty much in the church together. His dad was a deacon'; (2) 'So Doug has been down. He worked for General Motors at the time, doing recruiting for General Motors. So he graduated from Fort Valley State'; (3) 'I went downtown in Doug that started to work for Equitable Life Insurance Company.' The Whisper 'Doug Said' rendering is a phonetic mishearing of 'Doug Settle' — same individual (Browner's Fort-Valley-State-era friend who recruited him to Flint, MI). Layer-5 D2 ambiguity is resolved: 'Doug Settle' is the canonical form supported by three consistent attestations in the post-correction transcript.
